name: Keema Matar- Ground Lamb with Tomatoes and Peas - India
recipeIngredient: 2 inch piece fresh ginger root, coarsely chopped
1 hot green chili, seeds removed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Put onion, ginger, and garlic into a food processor and chop finely.
2. Heat oil in a wide nonstick pan over medium-high heat.
3. Add the chopped onion mixture to the pan and stir until it is slightly browned.
4. Stir in cumin seeds, coriander seeds, and turmeric.
5. Add chopped tomato and yogurt; stir on high heat until the tomato softens.
6. Add ground lamb, salt, and garam masala; stir, breaking up any lumps for about 2 minutes.
7. Pour in water and bring to a simmer. Cover and reduce heat to low.
8. Simmer for 25 minutes.
9. Stir in lemon juice, chopped green chili (with seeds removed), cilantro, and peas.
10. Bring back to a simmer, cover, and cook on low heat for an additional 10 minutes.
